title: ms-top-mitigations
description: LLM curation of the Management-Summary Top-Mitigations leader-board. The composer always shows every Critical-covering mitigation (coverage floor); this fragment orders the most important ADDITIONAL mitigations up to the rows.max clamp. Optional — absence falls back to deterministic ordering.

selected.description: Ordered, most-important-first list of mitigation ids to surface beyond the Critical floor.

rationale.description: One-sentence reason the selected extras matter most. Rendered into the section intro. No id enumeration.
